metadata.significance: Considered essence of the Quran, emphasizes faith, righteous deeds, truth, and patience

translations.en_yusufali: By (the Token of) Time (through the ages),

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati watawasaw bialhaqqi watawasaw bialssabri

translations.en_sahih: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.
translations.en_yusufali: Except such as have Faith, and do righteous deeds, and (join together) in the mutual teaching of Truth, and of Patience and Constancy.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal soleh, dan mereka pula berpesan-pesan dengan kebenaran serta berpesan-pesan dengan sabar.
